name: GT-jordan-product
source: HOS, refs/hos/joa-m.md:812 --- eq (2.17), definition of the (special) Jordan product, bilinear and commutative, VERBATIM: "$$a \circ b = \frac{1}{2}(ab + ba).$$". Commutativity aob=boa is immediate from symmetry of (ab+ba). Here the eps-JB product on B_sa is XoY=(1/2)(X*Y+Y*X), the SAME symmetrization formula applied to the eps-C* product * in place of the associative product; commutativity XoY=YoX is therefore exact. For X self-adjoint XoX=(1/2)(X*X+X*X)=X*X.
